body_txt: Being a housewife is harder than many people give it credit for; housewives have a number of responsibilities such as cooking, cleaning, laundry, preparing clothes, fixing the baths, picking up after everyone, and much more. Sadly, housewives are often unappreciated and looked down on, with many people thinking that housewives are freeloaders who don't do anything. Worse, there are some lazy women who want to become housewives because they think it just involves lying around all day while their husbands earn money. These so-called "housewives" are essentially just unemployed women who stay at home all day or spend time doing anything but housework. These "housewives" come in different forms; some are Gold Diggers who marry rich men in order to live in idle luxury . Others are beautiful women who either think their looks make them too good for housework or avoid it to avoid messing up their looks . Still others are just layabouts who can't be bothered to take care of the house. Despite their lack of housework, many of these women will still call themselves housewives. When it comes to cleaning, these women might either be content living in filth or have someone else do the cleaning. The person doing the cleaning might be either their husbands or their children. A woman who is married to a rich man might simply hire housekeepers to do the cleaning for them. In regard to cooking, they obviously won't bother doing it themselves. They might feed their husbands and children nothing but junk food, fast food, or ready-made meals. Some women might make their husbands or even their children do all the cooking. If the "housewife" is a mother, they are likely neglectful towards their children , avoiding interacting with them except out of necessity or personal gain. They might force their kids to do all the chores while they loaf around. Some of these types of women might only have kids to trap a man into marriage or out of societal or familial obligation, but not bother to take care of them afterward. Often times they might try to get other people, such as their husbands, a nanny, a maid and/or butler (for wealthy examples), or even other actual housewives to watch their kids in their place. There are a number of explanations of why someone would marry such a person; perhaps the woman used to be a good housewife but became lazier over time. Maybe the woman lied about their willingness/ability to do housework in order to trick their spouse into marriage. Maybe the husband is a pushover who can't be bothered to argue with his wife. It's also possible that one or both parties never wanted to be married to one another and only did so out of desperation, pressure from friends, family, and/or society, or the marriage being arranged . Distaff Counterpart to Lazy Husband . Sub-Trope of Lazy Bum and The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything . Attractive examples could be considered a more negative variation of Pretty Freeloaders . Often overlaps with Obnoxious Entitled Housewife . The later you get, the likelier it is that this overlaps with Idle Rich or Pottery Barn Poor , since most working- or even middle-class families aren't able to support themselves on one income, especially without a pressing reason to do so. See also Trophy Wife , who usually are expected to just look pretty rather than do any housework.
